LinkedIn 被曝扫描用户浏览器扩展

LinkedIn Caught Scanning Users' Browser Extensions

2026-04-03

Fairlinked e.V. 协会发布的调查报告揭露：LinkedIn 在未经用户同意的情况下，扫描访问者的浏览器扩展，收集敏感信息并传输给第三方。

调查发现

大规模个人数据泄露

LinkedIn 的扫描会暴露用户的宗教信仰、政治观点、残疾状况和求职活动。扫描对象包括：

  • 识别穆斯林用户的扩展
  • 揭示政治倾向的扩展
  • 为神经多样性用户设计的扩展
  • 509 种求职工具，暴露谁在秘密寻找工作

企业间谍活动和商业秘密盗窃

LinkedIn 扫描超过 200 种与其销售工具直接竞争的产品（如 Apollo、Lusha、ZoomInfo）。由于 LinkedIn 知道每个用户的雇主，它可以绘制哪些公司使用哪些竞争产品。

欺骗欧盟监管机构

2023 年欧盟将 LinkedIn 指定为受监管的门禁平台，要求其向第三方工具开放平台。LinkedIn 的回应是发布两个受限 API（每秒约 0.07 次调用），同时继续运营每秒 163,000 次调用的内部 Voyager API。

数据传输给第三方

LinkedIn 加载来自 HUMAN Security（美国-以色列网络安全公司）的隐形跟踪元素，在未经用户知情的情况下设置浏览器 cookie。

完整报告：https://browsergate.eu/

A report by Fairlinked e.V. association reveals that LinkedIn scans visitors' browser extensions without consent, collecting sensitive information and transmitting it to third parties.

Investigation Findings

Mass Personal Data Breach

LinkedIn's scan reveals users' religious beliefs, political opinions, disabilities, and job search activity. Scanned extensions include:

  • Extensions identifying Muslim users
  • Extensions revealing political orientation
  • Extensions built for neurodivergent users
  • 509 job search tools exposing who is secretly looking for work

Corporate Espionage and Trade Secret Theft

LinkedIn scans over 200 products that directly compete with its sales tools (Apollo, Lusha, ZoomInfo). Because LinkedIn knows each user's employer, it can map which companies use which competitor products.

Deceiving EU Regulators

In 2023, the EU designated LinkedIn as a regulated gatekeeper requiring platform openness. LinkedIn responded by publishing two restricted APIs (~0.07 calls/sec) while continuing to operate its internal Voyager API at 163,000 calls/sec.

Data Transfer to Third Parties

LinkedIn loads invisible tracking elements from HUMAN Security (US-Israeli cybersecurity firm), setting browser cookies without user knowledge.

Full report: https://browsergate.eu/
